data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for location-specific pricing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a 10% higher price for downtown services, there are no specific details or evidence showing how this pricing is implemented or validated in the system. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of specific evidence.
gaps: No evidence of location-specific pricing being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify location-specific pricing.
